dashboard_recap.headline: MLB Daily Recap - April 18, 2026
dashboard_recap.article:
**Yankees Blast Past Royals 13-4 in Dominant Performance**

Cody Bellinger led the charge for the Yankees, crushing two home runs and driving in five runs in a 3-for-4 outing. Will Warren turned in a stellar performance on the mound, tossing seven scoreless innings with 11 strikeouts to earn the win. Meanwhile, Carter Jensen and Amed Rosario also had strong games for the Yankees.

**Reds Outlast Twins in Thrilling Finish**

The Cincinnati Reds edged out the Minnesota Twins 5-4, thanks in part to Tyler Stephenson's 2-RBI effort. Kyle Nicolas earned the win with a strong relief appearance, striking out three in a scoreless inning. Eugenio Suárez and Nathaniel Lowe were among the Twins' top performers.

**Cubs Edge Mets in Low-Scoring Affair**

The Chicago Cubs secured a 4-2 victory over the New York Mets, with Carson Kelly hitting a solo home run and driving in three runs. Jameson Taillon earned the win with six strong innings, striking out four.

**Rays Rally Past Pirates in Extra Innings**

The Tampa Bay Rays outlasted the Pittsburgh Pirates 8-7, thanks to Cedric Mullins' 3-RBI effort. Griffin Jax earned the win in relief, striking out two in a scoreless inning.

**Giants Edge Nationals in Low-Scoring Affair**

The San Francisco Giants took down the Washington Nationals 7-6, with Heliot Ramos hitting a solo home run and driving in two runs. Caleb Kilian earned the win with four strong innings, striking out five.

**Athletics Outlast White Sox in Walk-Off Fashion**

The Oakland Athletics edged out the Chicago White Sox 7-6, thanks to Andrew Benintendi's solo home run and 3-RBI effort. Jack Perkins earned the win with 2.1 scoreless innings in relief.

**Tigers Shut Down Red Sox**

The Detroit Tigers secured a 4-1 victory over the Boston Red Sox, thanks to Tarik Skubal's 6-scoreless innings and 10 strikeouts. Kerry Carpenter also had a strong game, hitting a solo home run and driving in two runs.

**Brewers Outlast Marlins**

The Milwaukee Brewers took down the Miami Marlins 5-2, thanks to Brice Turang's solo home run and 3-RBI effort. Brandon Woodruff earned the win with seven strong innings, striking out four.

**Guardians Outlast Orioles**

The Cleveland Guardians edged out the Baltimore Orioles 4-2, thanks to Brayan Rocchio's solo home run and 3-RBI effort. Gavin Williams earned the win with seven scoreless innings, striking out 11.

**Cardinals Outlast Astros**

The St. Louis Cardinals took down the Houston Astros 7-5, thanks to Shay Whitcomb's solo home run and 3-RBI effort. Andre Pallante earned the win with five strong innings, striking out five.

**Mariners Outlast Rangers**

The Seattle Mariners edged out the Texas Rangers 7-3, thanks to Josh Jung's solo home run and 1-RBI effort. George Kirby earned the win with 5.2 scoreless innings, striking out five.

**Braves Shut Down Phillies**

The Atlanta Braves secured a 3-1 victory over the Philadelphia Phillies, thanks to Cristopher Sánchez's 6-scoreless innings and 8 strikeouts. Felix Reyes also had a strong game, hitting a solo home run and driving in one run.

**Rockies Outlast Dodgers**

The Colorado Rockies took down the Los Angeles Dodgers 4-3, thanks to Kyle Tucker's solo home run and 2-RBI effort. Brennan Bernardino earned the win with a scoreless inning in relief.

**Diamondbacks Outlast Blue Jays**

The Arizona Diamondbacks edged out the Toronto Blue Jays 6-2, thanks to Corbin Carroll's grand slam and 4-RBI effort. Juan Morillo earned the win with 1.1 scoreless innings, striking out two.

**Padres Outlast Angels**

The San Diego Padres secured a 4-1 victory over the Los Angeles Angels, thanks to Fernando Tatis Jr.'s 2-RBI effort. Yusei Kikuchi earned the win with six strong innings, striking out eight.
